text.body:
Order No: 2526116
Product: Soya Lecithin Powder
Quantity: 39 MT
Packing: 25 kgs in PP bags
Price: USD 2850/MT, CIF Nhava Sheva
Payment Terms Against Scan copies of documents
Specification: As per Standard specification of GIIOFINE-P-S
Delivery: In Feb 2026
Remarks:
1.
The Material to be supplied as per specification sheet
2.
Certificate of analysis for supply to be given with respective tank. as per Specification Sheet
3.
Material should be invoiced to: GIIAVA (India) Pvt. Ltd., Plot No. C3, Wai MIDC, Dist – Satara, Maharashtra – 412803
4.
Small Labels to be pasted on every bags
